title: Get qualifications within a Business Center
content:
Use this endpoint to retrieve existing qualifications within a Business Center. Once you obtain the `qualification_id` from the response, you can reuse the qualification for ad account creation by passing it to the `qualification_id` parameter in [/bc/advertiser/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939020318721). ## Before you start - Ensure that you have created an ad account using [/bc/advertiser/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739939020318721) by specifying `qualification_info`. The specified `qualification_info` will be used to generate a `qualification_id`. If you do not specify the `qualification_info` when you create an ad account, you cannot get `qualification_id` for reuse. - Ensure that you have Admin access to the Business Center. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/advertiser/qualification/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| | bc_id {Required}| object | Business Center ID.

To obtain the list of Business Centers that you have access to, use [/bc/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737115687501826). | |filtering|object|Filtering conditions. | #|verified|boolean|Whether the qualifications are verified or not. | |page|int|Current number of pages. Default value: `1`. Value range : ≥ 1.| |page_size|int|Page size. Default value: `10`. Value range: 1-100.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location -g --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/advertiser/qualification/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&filtering={"verified": true}' \ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix-Return codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |data |object|Return data.| #|qualifications|object[]|Qualification information. | ##|qualification_id|string|Qualification id.| ##|company_name|string|Company name.| ##|status|string|Qualifications verification status. Enum values：`VERIFIED` , `UNVERIFIED`.| ##|owner_advertiser_id|string|Advertiser ID of the qualifications owner.| ##|linked_advertiser_count|int|Number of linked advertiser accounts.| ##|region_code|string|Country or region code. For example, "DE".| #|page_info|object| Pagination information| ##|page|number| Current page number| ##|page_size| number | Page size| ##|total_number| number | Total number of results | ##|total_page| number | Total pages of results| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "page_info": { "page_size": 10, "page": 1, "total_page": 1, "total_number": 4 }, "qualifications": [ { "status": "VERIFIED", "region_code": "US", "linked_advertiser_count": 1, "qualification_id": "{{qualification_id}}", "owner_advertiser_id": "{{owner_advertiser_id}}", "company_name": "{{company_name}}" }, { "status": "VERIFIED", "region_code": "US", "linked_advertiser_count": 3, "qualification_id": "{{qualification_id}}", "owner_advertiser_id": "{{owner_advertiser_id}}", "company_name": "{{company_name}}" }, { "status": "VERIFIED", "region_code": "US", "linked_advertiser_count": 1, "qualification_id": "{{qualification_id}}", "owner_advertiser_id": "{{owner_advertiser_id}}", "company_name": "{{company_name}}" }, { "status": "VERIFIED", "region_code": "US", "linked_advertiser_count": 1, "qualification_id": "{{qualification_id}}", "owner_advertiser_id": "{{owner_advertiser_id}}", "company_name": "{{company_name}}" } ] } } (/code) ```
